endpoints.label: Candlestick Coin

fields.label: Base Currency Name or ID
fields.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Quote Currency Name or ID
fields.description: The second currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is ETH. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Range (Days)
fields.description: Return data for this many days in the past from now

endpoints.description: Get a candlestick open-high-low-close chart for the selected currency

endpoints.label: Get Coin

fields.label: Search By
fields.description: Search by coin ID or contract address

fields.label: Coin Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Platform ID
fields.description: The ID of the platform issuing tokens

fields.label: Contract Address
fields.description: Token's contract address

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: community_data, developer_data, localization, market_data, sparkline, tickers)

endpoints.description: Get current data for a coin

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.label: History Coin

fields.label: Coin Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Date
fields.description: The date of data snapshot (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: localization)

endpoints.description: Get historical data (name, price, market, stats) at a given date for a coin

endpoints.label: Market Coin

fields.label: Base Currency Name or ID
fields.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: ids, category, order, sparkline, price_change_percentage)

endpoints.description: Get prices and market related data for all trading pairs that match the selected currency

fields.label: Search By
fields.description: Search by coin ID or contract address

fields.description: The ID of the platform issuing tokens

fields.label: Contract Address
fields.description: Token's contract address

fields.label: Base Currency Name or ID
fields.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Quote Currency Name or ID
fields.description: The second currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is ETH. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

endpoints.description: Get historical market data include price, market cap, and 24h volume (granularity auto)

endpoints.label: Price Coin

fields.label: Search By
fields.description: Search by coin ID or contract address

fields.label: Base Currency Names or IDs
fields.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression. (multiple values: comma-separated)

fields.label: Platform ID
fields.description: The ID of the platform issuing tokens

fields.label: Contract Addresses
fields.description: The contract address of tokens, comma-separated

fields.label: Quote Currency Names or IDs
fields.description: The second currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is ETH. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression. (multiple values: comma-separated)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: include_24hr_change, include_24hr_vol, include_last_updated_at, include_market_cap)

endpoints.description: Get the current price of any cryptocurrencies in any other supported currencies that you need

fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: exchange_ids, include_exchange_logo, order)

fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit
